title: Was Misato simply using Makoto Hyuga
display_title: Was Misato simply using Makoto Hyuga
wikitext:
[]: Was Misato simply using Makoto Hyuga?             Quote Post by Slowpokeking » Sat Sep 07, 2024 6:16 pm She obviously knew his affection for her and letting him betray Gendo to help her. It would be risky for him as well.

[]: Re: Was Misato simply using Makoto Hyuga?             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sun Sep 08, 2024 10:12 am Slowpokeking wrote: She obviously knew his affection for her and letting him betray Gendo to help her. It would be risky for him as well.

[]: Re: Was Misato simply using Makoto Hyuga?             Quote Post by Slowpokeking » Sun Sep 08, 2024 11:22 am Interestingly, in the draft of ep24 she joked him for being gay. But I think that line was inappropriate so no wonder it got removed. Also how much did Misato tell Hyuga, just let him do this or that?

[]: Re: Was Misato simply using Makoto Hyuga?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Sep 08, 2024 5:10 pm As you will find in the notes, the draft in case was an early proposal by one of the writers for what would eventually become the actual episode. On topic, I think Makoto, who is shown to be quite naive and childish, much like Maya, probably had some half-hearted hope that he had a chance with Misato, and Misato herself was aware of this. I don't think she was indifferent towards Makoto and probably did feel bad about using him, but she did it nonetheless.

[]: Re: Was Misato simply using Makoto Hyuga?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Sep 10, 2024 8:49 am Using men and sex to get what she wants is literally part of her character, so I guess so. But I bet she considered him a good friend regardless.
